bridgeIfs.description: Bridge the provided network interfaces with the tunneler's tap interface.

bindUsingEdgeIdentity.description: Associate the hosting terminator with the name of the hosting tunneler's identity. Setting this to 'true' is equivalent to setting 'identiy=$tunneler_id.name'

connectTimeout.description: Timeout when making outbound connections. Defaults to '5s'. If both connectTimoutSeconds and connectTimeout are specified, connectTimeout will be used.

connectTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout when making outbound connections. Defaults to 5. If both connectTimoutSeconds and connectTimeout are specified, connectTimeout will be used.

identity.description: Associate the hosting terminator with the specified identity. '$tunneler_id.name' resolves to the name of the hosting tunneler's identity. '$tunneler_id.tag[tagName]' resolves to the value of the 'tagName' tag on the hosting tunneler's identity.
